testcase.name: tc_fr03_fn_12_graphCircularDependency

failure.message: Algorithm fails to detect cycle, allowing circular connection which causes infinite loops later.

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Algorithm fails to detect cycle, allowing circular connection which causes infinite loops later. at com.sqa.doan.tests.CanvasDesignTest.tc_fr03_fn_12_graphCircularDependency(CanvasDesignTest.java:215) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 30 stack frames
